problem id: 52a9d5e4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  00010111 -> 11001011
  10111010 -> 11011101
  10000000 -> 01000000
  10111000 -> 01011100
  01111010 -> 10111101
  10001100 -> 01000110
  00111001 -> 01011100
  11001010 -> 11100101

query: 00111111
predicted answer: 11011111
